# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /home/benno111/Documents/GitHub/DF-New/deps/android-build/x86/SDL_image
# It was generated by CMake: /usr/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
ANDROID_PLATFORM:UNINITIALIZED=android-24

//Build the library as a shared library
BUILD_SHARED_LIBS:BOOL=OFF

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
BUILD_TESTING:UNINITIALIZED=OFF

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_ADDR2LINE:FILEPATH=/home/benno111/Android/Sdk/ndk/29.0.14206865/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/linux-x86_64/bin/llvm-addr2line

//Archiver
CMAKE_AR:FILEPATH=/home/benno111/Android/Sdk/ndk/29.0.14206865/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/linux-x86_64/bin/llvm-ar

//Flags used by the compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the compiler during debug builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the compiler during release builds.

// MinSizeRel ...
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=Release

//Enable/Disable color output during build.
CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE:BOOL=ON

//LLVM archiver
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/home/benno111/Android/Sdk/ndk/29.0.14206865/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/linux-x86_64/bin/llvm-ar

//`clang-scan-deps` dependency scanner

//Generate index for LLVM archive

CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the compiler during debug builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the compiler during release builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//Libraries linked by default with all C++ applications.
CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_LIBRARIES:STRING=-latomic -lm

//Add ANI save support
SDLIMAGE_ANI_SAVE:BOOL=ON

//Support loading AVIF images
SDLIMAGE_AVIF:BOOL=OFF

//Add BMP save support
SDLIMAGE_BMP_SAVE:BOOL=ON

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
SDLIMAGE_DAV1D:UNINITIALIZED=OFF

//Load dependencies dynamically
SDLIMAGE_DEPS_SHARED:BOOL=OFF

//Support loading GIF images
SDLIMAGE_GIF:BOOL=ON

//Add GIF save support
SDLIMAGE_GIF_SAVE:BOOL=ON

//Enable SDL3_image install target
SDLIMAGE_INSTALL:BOOL=ON

//Root folder where to install SDL3_imageConfig.cmake related files
// (SDL3_image subfolder for MSVC projects)
SDLIMAGE_INSTALL_CMAKEDIR_ROOT:STRING=lib/cmake

SDLIMAGE_INSTALL_CPACK:BOOL=ON

//Install man pages for SDL3_image
SDLIMAGE_INSTALL_MAN:BOOL=OFF

//Support loading JPEG images
SDLIMAGE_JPG:BOOL=ON

//Add JPEG save support
SDLIMAGE_JPG_SAVE:BOOL=ON

//Support loading JXL images
SDLIMAGE_JXL:BOOL=OFF

//Support loading LBM images
SDLIMAGE_LBM:BOOL=ON

//Support loading PCX images
SDLIMAGE_PCX:BOOL=ON

//Support loading PNG images
SDLIMAGE_PNG:BOOL=ON

//Support loading PNGs using libpng (useful for APNGs)
SDLIMAGE_PNG_LIBPNG:BOOL=ON

//Add PNG save support
SDLIMAGE_PNG_SAVE:BOOL=ON

//Dynamically load PNG support (requires shared libpng)
SDLIMAGE_PNG_SHARED:BOOL=OFF

//Support loading PNM images
SDLIMAGE_PNM:BOOL=ON

//Support loading QOI images
SDLIMAGE_QOI:BOOL=ON

//Create relocatable SDL_image package
SDLIMAGE_RELOCATABLE:BOOL=OFF

//Build the SDL3_image sample program(s)
SDLIMAGE_SAMPLES:BOOL=OFF

//Fail when a dependency could not be found
SDLIMAGE_STRICT:BOOL=OFF

//Support loading SVG images
SDLIMAGE_SVG:BOOL=ON

//Build unit tests?
SDLIMAGE_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//Install unit tests?
SDLIMAGE_TESTS_INSTALL:BOOL=OFF

//Support loading TGA images
SDLIMAGE_TGA:BOOL=ON

//Add TGA save support
SDLIMAGE_TGA_SAVE:BOOL=ON

//Support loading TIFF images
SDLIMAGE_TIF:BOOL=ON

//Dynamically load TIFF support (requires shared libtiff)
SDLIMAGE_TIF_SHARED:BOOL=OFF

//Use vendored third-party libraries
SDLIMAGE_VENDORED:BOOL=ON

//Support loading WEBP images
SDLIMAGE_WEBP:BOOL=OFF

//Treat warnings as errors
SDLIMAGE_WERROR:BOOL=OFF

//Support loading XCF images
SDLIMAGE_XCF:BOOL=ON

//Support loading XPM images
SDLIMAGE_XPM:BOOL=ON

//Support loading XV images
SDLIMAGE_XV:BOOL=ON

SDL_CPU_ARM32:BOOL=0

//Detected architecture ARM64
SDL_CPU_ARM64:BOOL=0

//Detected architecture ARM64EC
SDL_CPU_ARM64EC:BOOL=0

//Detected architecture EMSCRIPTEN
SDL_CPU_EMSCRIPTEN:BOOL=0

//Detected architecture RISCV64
SDL_CPU_RISCV64:BOOL=0

//Detected architecture X64
SDL_CPU_X64:BOOL=0

//Detected architecture X86
SDL_CPU_X86:BOOL=1

TIFF_DEFAULT_STRIP_SIZE:STRING=8192

//Maximum number of TIFF directories that libtiff can browse through
TIFF_MAX_DIR_COUNT:STRING=1048576

ZSTD_LIBRARY_DEBUG:FILEPATH=ZSTD_LIBRARY_DEBUG-NOTFOUND

//Path to a library.
ZSTD_LIBRARY_RELEASE:FILEPATH=ZSTD_LIBRARY_RELEASE-NOTFOUND

//support for CCITT Group 3 & 4 algorithms
ccitt:BOOL=ON

//enable picking up YCbCr subsampling info from the JPEG data stream
// to support files lacking the tag
check-ycbcr-subsampling:BOOL=ON

//enable reading large strips in chunks for TIFFReadScanline()
// (experimental)
chunky-strip-read:BOOL=OFF

//enable deferred strip/tile offset/size loading (also available
// at runtime with the 'D' flag of TIFFOpen())
defer-strile-load:BOOL=OFF

//Enable extra compiler warnings
extra-warnings:BOOL=OFF

//the RGBA interface will treat a fourth sample with no EXTRASAMPLE_
// value as being ASSOCALPHA. Many packages produce RGBA files
// but don't mark the alpha properly
extrasample-as-alpha:BOOL=ON

//Compiler warnings are errors
fatal-warnings:BOOL=OFF

//use ISO JBIG compression (requires JBIT-KIT library)
jbig:BOOL=OFF

//use libjpeg (required for JPEG compression)
jpeg:BOOL=OFF

//enable libjpeg 8/12-bit dual mode (requires separate 12-bit libjpeg
// build)
jpeg12:BOOL=OFF

//Enable linker version script
ld-version-script:BOOL=ON

//use libLerc (required for LERC compression)
lerc:BOOL=OFF

//use libdeflate (optional for faster Deflate support, still requires
// zlib)
libdeflate:BOOL=OFF

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for liblzma.
liblzma_DIR:PATH=liblzma_DIR-NOTFOUND

//Value Computed by CMake
libpng_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/benno111/Documents/GitHub/DF-New/deps/android-build/x86/SDL_image/external/libpng-build

//Value Computed by CMake
libpng_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
libpng_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/benno111/Documents/GitHub/DF-New/deps/android-src/SDL_image/external/libpng

//support for LogLuv high dynamic range algorithm
logluv:BOOL=ON

//use liblzma (required for LZMA2 compression)
lzma:BOOL=OFF

//support for LZW algorithm
lzw:BOOL=ON

//support for Microsoft Document Imaging
mdi:BOOL=ON

//support for NeXT 2-bit RLE algorithm
next:BOOL=ON

//support for Old JPEG compression (read-only)
old-jpeg:BOOL=OFF

//support for Macintosh PackBits algorithm
packbits:BOOL=ON

//support for Pixar log-format algorithm (requires Zlib)
pixarlog:BOOL=OFF

//strip chopping (whether or not to convert single-strip uncompressed
// images to mutiple strips of specified size to reduce memory
// usage)
strip-chopping:BOOL=ON

//support for ThunderScan 4-bit RLE algorithm
thunder:BOOL=ON

//build TIFF contrib
tiff-contrib:BOOL=OFF

//Enable C++ stream API building (requires C++ compiler)
tiff-cxx:BOOL=OFF

//build TIFF deprecated features
tiff-deprecated:BOOL=OFF

//build TIFF documentation
tiff-docs:BOOL=OFF

//install TIFF targets
tiff-install:BOOL=OFF

//use OpenGL (required for tiffgt viewer)
tiff-opengl:BOOL=OFF

//build TIFF static libraries
tiff-static:BOOL=ON

//build TIFF tests
tiff-tests:BOOL=OFF

//build TIFF tools
tiff-tools:BOOL=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
tiff_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/benno111/Documents/GitHub/DF-New/deps/android-build/x86/SDL_image/external/libtiff-build

//Value Computed by CMake
tiff_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Dependencies for the target
tiff_LIB_DEPENDS:STATIC=general;/home/benno111/Android/Sdk/ndk/29.0.14206865/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/linux-x86_64/sysroot/usr/lib/i686-linux-android/24/libm.so;

//Value Computed by CMake
tiff_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/benno111/Documents/GitHub/DF-New/deps/android-src/SDL_image/external/libtiff

//use libwebp (required for WEBP compression)
webp:BOOL=OFF

//Use Win32 I/O
win32-io:BOOL=OFF

//use zlib (required for Deflate compression)
zlib:BOOL=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
zlib_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/benno111/Documents/GitHub/DF-New/deps/android-build/x86/SDL_image/external/zlib-build

//Value Computed by CMake
zlib_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
zlib_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/benno111/Documents/GitHub/DF-New/deps/android-src/SDL_image/external/zlib

//use libzstd (required for ZSTD compression)
zstd:BOOL=OFF


########################
# INTERNAL cache entries
########################
